title: Manual QA: hotkeys, hold/toggle, voice commands, record mode
description:
Per PLAN.md section 13: Manual QA. Tests: (1) Both L/R Cmd+Opt combos work, release-before-type guard, (2) Hold mode capture->transcribe->type without stray modifiers, (3) Toggle 3.0s silence auto-stop with adjustable threshold, (4) Voice commands map to keys/punctuation, (5) Logs searchable with export, (6) Record mode hours-long session rotates cleanly, (7) No socket opens / CSP blocks connections, (8) Mic + Accessibility prompts appear.

This test requires: stt-rtf (audio capture), stt-y3w (hotkey wiring), stt-pmb (transcription to typer), stt-1j5 (toggle mode), stt-bq4 (record capture), stt-rdp (file rotation), kb1 (permissions). All core implementation must be complete before manual QA can pass.
design: Cross-cutting: tests all workstreams (audio-pipeline, record-mode, model-ui, session-persistence)

title: Implement local speech-to-text with whisper-rs
description:
Added local speech-to-text capability using whisper-rs with Metal GPU acceleration for Apple Silicon.

**Added:**
- stt.rs module: Model loading (3 profiles), transcription, voice commands, SHA256 verification
- lib.rs commands: load_model, transcribe, is_model_loaded
- Dependencies: whisper-rs (metal), sha2, hex

**Tauri Commands:**
- load_model(profile) - Load whisper model into memory
- transcribe(audio_data) - Run transcription on audio float array
- is_model_loaded() - Check if model is ready

**Model Options:**
- English Small (~75MB) - Fastest, English-only
- Multilingual Small (~75MB) - Fast, any language  
- Multilingual Medium (~250MB) - Slower, better accuracy

Uses Metal framework for GPU inference on M1/M2/M3 chips.
close_reason: Closed

title: Use shared whisper model location
description:
Per PLAN.md section 'Preferences & Files', models dir should use XDG cache location for shared model storage. Currently uses app-specific directory which prevents cross-app model sharing (other apps may also use whisper.cpp with same models). Update prefs.rs get_models_dir() to use XDG cache directory (ProjectDirs from com.whisper.shared).API Location: apps/web/src-tauri/src/prefs.rs - get_models_dir() function.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Models stored in ~/.cache/whisper/models/
- [ ] Compatible with other whisper.cpp apps using same location
- [ ] Config still works with existing models if any
- [ ] Existing users can migrate by moving model files
close_reason: Completed - code already merged to develop

close_reason: Complete - implemented: enigo keystroke synthesis, modifier release guard, throttle per char, clipboard fallback, newline append, code context detection (text heuristics + macOS accessibility API), password field detection (macOS AX API)

title: Write tests and perform QA

title: Fix test compilation errors in stt.rs
description:
The Rust test suite fails to compile due to missing types in src/stt.rs. The test code references VoiceCommandMap and VoiceCommands from prefs, but these types don't exist in the codebase. This prevents running all unit tests including audio.rs tests which do compile and should pass.

Error: cannot find struct, variant or union type `VoiceCommandMap` in this scope
Error: cannot find struct, variant or union type `VoiceCommands` in this scope

This is blocking test execution for the entire project. The audio.rs module has existing unit tests (test_rms_calculation_*, test_resample_linear_*) that cannot be run due to this compilation failure in stt.rs tests.

title: Build UI: /settings page - model management
description:
Model management UI for /settings page. Per PLAN.md section 'Preferences & Files', models dir is ~/Library/Application Support/sst/models/ with verification via SHA-256. This task adds Tauri commands to lib.rs and React UI components for model status display and verification.

API Location: commands go in apps/web/src-tauri/src/lib.rs, ModelInfo struct in apps/web/src-tauri/src/stt.rs.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Settings shows model status for small.en, multilingual-small, multilingual-medium
- Each profile shows filename, expected SHA-256, installation status (missing/present/verified)
- Verify button computes SHA-256 vs expected and updates status
- Current loaded model displayed in HUD
- Links to https://huggingface.co/ggerganov/whisper.cpp for download

Depends on: stt-rtf (audio capture) - must be complete before full PTT can work
close_reason: Added model management UI to /settings page with SHA-256 verification
